# Cascading split — after insert(28). Order m=3.
#
# Leaf e=[25,30] overflows -> 28 promoted into b. b=[20,35] then becomes
# [20,28,35] and overflows -> 28 promoted into root. Tree grows one level on
# the left spine; root ends as [28,50] with three children.
#
#                     [28,50]                       a (root)
#                   /   |    \
#              [20]   [35]    [70]                   b'  b''  c
#             /   \   /   \   /   \
#       [10,15] [25] [30] [38,40] [60] [80]
root 1
1  2  2  28 3  50 4
2  1  5  20 6
3  1  7  35 8
4  1  9  70 10
5  2  0  10 0  15 0
6  1  0  25 0
7  1  0  30 0
8  2  0  38 0  40 0
9  1  0  60 0
10 1  0  80 0
